caption: A video game simulation of an American football game takes place in a large stadium filled with spectators. On a green field marked with white lines and yard markers, players in white and blue uniforms face off against players in red and black uniforms. In the foreground, a small inset window shows a blond man wearing a dark blue shirt and white headphones. Across the top of the screen, a scoreboard displays "2nd & 8", the score "14" and "7", and the time "2:03" and "3rd", with a clock reading ":13" in the first frame and ":30" in the final frame. As the play progresses, the players move across the field, and a red banner appears at the bottom with the text "THROW AWAY". The scene shifts from a wide view of the field to a closer perspective of the players in action, while the man in the inset continues to observe the game.
